description: Loadify – AI-powered mobile QA automation for outsourcing agencies. AI agents run test scenarios on real iOS/Android devices, auto-generate test cases from requirements, execute with pass/fail flags, and keep tests up-to-date when requirements change. Targets outsourcing companies (5-50 people) in Russia/CIS who do mobile app development for clients. Pricing: $1000/month SaaS or $2000-5000/month done-for-you testing service. Working alpha already exists. Value prop: fewer QA headcount, more bugs caught, scale client load without hiring.
reasoning: Pinned idea for direct validation – Loadify.ai mobile QA automation
